title: HKUDS/Vibe-Trading
friendlyTitle: Vibe-Trading is an AI trading research workspace
summary: Vibe-Trading is an open-source AI trading research workspace for market-data analysis, strategy generation, backtesting, reports, reusable memory, and multi-agent trading research workflows.
friendlySummary: This repo lets users ask trading questions, test strategies, and generate market research reports with AI agents.
whyItMatters: Use it to prototype and backtest trading ideas from natural-language prompts, produce reports, and compare strategies before any real trading decisions. It is best treated as a research and simulation tool, not a substitute for financial judgment.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can help explore ideas before real trading, but users should still verify results carefully and manage risk themselves.
